title: #3.11: You might be eating beaver butt-secrete and posion! (EN)
description: Vanilla ice cream in a cone with chocolate syrup and sprinkles. Sound amazing, right? Well think again! Our listeners Signe and Line have informed us that ice cream contains beaver butt, and we've put Mark on the case! The ice cream might also contain poison! A very real threat about a hundred years ago when the Poison Squad was founded to show the world that they were about to die from food. Check out our merchandise
